<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.17 -->

# attractor-llm

Unified LLM client crate. Abstracts Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini APIs behind common `Request`/`Response` types with middleware hooks, provider auto-detection from environment variables, and type-erased provider collections.

## Contents

- [Cargo.toml](./Cargo.toml) — Crate manifest. Edition 2021. Dependencies: `attractor-types`, `tokio`, `reqwest`, `serde`, `serde_json`, `async-trait`, `thiserror`. Feature `providers` enables adapter exports.
- [src/lib.rs](./src/lib.rs) — Root exports. Re-exports `types::*` unconditionally. Re-exports `client::*`, `provider::*`, and provider adapters under `providers` feature flag.
- [src/types.rs](./src/types.rs) — Core domain types. `Role`, `ContentPart`, `Message`, `Request`, `Response`, `Usage`, `FinishReason`, `ToolDefinition`, `ToolCallResult`, `StreamEvent`, `ToolChoice`, `ReasoningEffort`. Serde contracts use `snake_case` tagging.
- [src/provider.rs](./src/provider.rs) — `ProviderAdapter` trait with `#[async_trait]` methods `complete()`, `stream()`, and capability probes. `DynProvider` type-erasing wrapper for `Box<dyn ProviderAdapter>`.
- [src/client.rs](./src/client.rs) — `LlmClient` orchestrates middleware chains and provider resolution. Implements `LoggingMiddleware`, `CostTrackingMiddleware` with `before`/`after` hooks. `ModelCatalog` hardcodes metadata for `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`, `gpt-4o`, `gemini-2.5-pro`.
- [src/anthropic.rs](./src/anthropic.rs) — `AnthropicAdapter` implementing `ProviderAdapter`. Targets Anthropic Messages API v1. Injects `cache_control: {"type": "ephemeral"}` on system messages and last user message for prompt caching.
- [src/openai.rs](./src/openai.rs) — `OpenAiAdapter` implementing `ProviderAdapter`. Targets OpenAI Responses API at `/v1/responses`. Maps `reasoning_effort` to JSON `{"effort": "low"|"medium"|"high"}`.
- [src/gemini.rs](./src/gemini.rs) — `GeminiAdapter` implementing `ProviderAdapter`. Targets Gemini generateContent REST API. Converts `Role::System` to `systemInstruction.parts`. Formats image content as `"[image: {}]"` text placeholders.

## Stack

Rust crate `attractor-llm`. HTTP client `reqwest`. Async runtime `tokio`. Serialization `serde`, `serde_json`. Streaming abstractions `futures_core::Stream`, `tokio-stream`. Trait async support `async-trait`. Error types from `attractor_types::AttractorError`. Entry point `LlmClient::from_env()` auto-registers adapters based on present environment variables.

## Architecture / Data Flow

`LlmClient::complete()` executes middleware `before` hooks sequentially, delegates to resolved `ProviderAdapter`, executes `after` hooks. Provider resolution follows three-tier fallback: `request.provider` explicit name → `ModelCatalog` lookup by model ID → first registered provider. Adapters translate `Request` to provider-specific JSON via `build_request_body`, POST via `reqwest::Client`, parse with `parse_response`, map HTTP errors via `map_error`.

## API Surface

Public exports from `lib.rs`:

- `types::*`: `Role`, `Message`, `ContentPart`, `Request`, `Response`, `Usage`, `FinishReason`, `ToolDefinition`, `ToolCallResult`, `StreamEvent`, `ToolChoice`, `ReasoningEffort`
- `ProviderAdapter` trait, `DynProvider` wrapper
- `LlmClient`, `Middleware` trait, `LoggingMiddleware`, `CostTrackingMiddleware`, `ModelCatalog`, `ModelInfo`
- `AnthropicAdapter`, `OpenAiAdapter`, `GeminiAdapter` (requires `providers` feature)

Constructor patterns: `AnthropicAdapter::new(api_key)`, `from_env()` requiring `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `with_base_url(url)` chain method. `LlmClient::register_provider()` inserts into `HashMap<String, DynProvider>`.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Endpoint Templates**

- Anthropic: `format!("{}/v1/messages", self.base_url)` with `base_url` default `"https://api.anthropic.com"`
- OpenAI: `format!("{}/v1/responses", self.base_url)` with `base_url` default `"https://api.openai.com"`
- Gemini: `format!("{}/models/{}:generateContent?key={}", self.base_url, model, self.api_key)` with `base_url` default `"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta"`

**HTTP Headers**

- Anthropic: `x-api-key: &self.api_key`, `anthropic-version: "2023-06-01"`, `content-type: application/json`
- OpenAI: `Authorization: Bearer {api_key}`, `content-type: application/json`
- Gemini: `content-type: application/json` only (API key in query string)

**Environment Variables**

- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` for `AnthropicAdapter::from_env()`
- `OPENAI_API_KEY` for `OpenAiAdapter::from_env()`
- `GOOGLE_API_KEY` or `GEMINI_API_KEY` for `GeminiAdapter::from_env()`

**JSON Paths**

- Error message extraction: `error.message` (all providers)
- Anthropic rate limit: `error.retry_after` (seconds, multiply by 1000 for `retry_after_ms`)
- Gemini usage: `usageMetadata.promptTokenCount`, `candidatesTokenCount`, `totalTokenCount`
- OpenAI usage: `usage.input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `input_tokens_details.cached_tokens`, `output_tokens_details.reasoning_tokens`

**Cache Control Injection (Anthropic)**

- System messages: inject `cache_control: {"type": "ephemeral"}` per block in top-level `"system"` array
- Last user message: `is_last_user_message()` check triggers `inject_cache_control_on_last_part()` mutation

**Content Markers (Gemini)**

- Image with URL: `"[image: {}]"` where `{}` replaced with URL
- Image without URL: `"[unsupported image content]"`
- Audio/Document: `"[unsupported content type]"`
- RedactedThinking: `"[redacted]"`

**Finish Reason Mappings**

- Anthropic: `"end_turn"` → `EndTurn`, `"max_tokens"` → `MaxTokens`, `"stop_sequence"` → `StopSequence`, `"tool_use"` → `ToolUse`
- OpenAI: `"completed"` → `EndTurn` (or `ToolUse` if function_call present), `"incomplete"` → `MaxTokens`
- Gemini: `"STOP"` → `EndTurn`, `"MAX_TOKENS"` → `MaxTokens`, `"SAFETY"` → `EndTurn`, `"STOP_SEQUENCE"` → `StopSequence`

**Retryable Error Codes**

- Anthropic: `500`, `529` → `retryable: true`; `400` → `retryable: false`; `429` → `RateLimited`
- OpenAI: `500`, `502`, `503` → `retryable: true`; `400` → `retryable: false`
- Gemini: `500`, `503` → `retryable: true`; `400` → `retryable: false`

**Default Models**

- Anthropic: `"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"`
- OpenAI: `"gpt-4o"`
- Gemini: `"gemini-2.5-pro"`

**Context Window Sizes**

- Anthropic: `200_000`
- OpenAI: `128_000`
- Gemini: `1_000_000`

## File Relationships

- `lib.rs` exports `types::*` and conditionally `client::*`, `provider::*`, adapters
- `client.rs` imports `ProviderAdapter` from `provider.rs`, `AttractorError` from `attractor_types`
- `anthropic.rs`, `openai.rs`, `gemini.rs` implement `ProviderAdapter`, import `Request`, `Response`, `Usage`, `FinishReason` from `types.rs`
- `client.rs` `from_env()` constructs `AnthropicAdapter`, `OpenAiAdapter`, `GeminiAdapter` via their respective `from_env()` constructors
- `CostTrackingMiddleware` shares `Arc<AtomicU64>` state across clones via `Ordering::Relaxed`
